name: one-step-at-a-time
description: Comprehensive daily task, project, and life management system using the PARA method. Transform messy thoughts into organized tasks, track projects with goals and timelines, manage areas of responsibility with habits/maintenance/obligations, and maintain a daily workflow with automatic rollover. Includes 22 slash commands, 6 proactive skills, workspace locking for concurrent session safety, and support for recurring items with consequence tracking.
